## Production Hotfix

- [ ] Source branch is based on `main`
- [ ] Target branch is `main`
- [ ] Issue is production-impacting and should not wait for the next `developer` promotion

## Scope

- [ ] Fix is intentionally minimal
- [ ] Risky refactors and unrelated cleanup were avoided
- [ ] User-facing impact is described below

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm check` or the relevant reduced verification was run
- [ ] Manual verification was performed against the affected flow
- [ ] Any release/update impact has been noted

## Follow-Up

- [ ] Merge or cherry-pick this hotfix back into `developer` after `main` is updated
- [ ] Add any follow-up cleanup work as a separate issue or PR if needed

## Notes

-
